About Me

Building interfaces people love to use

I'm an aspiring Frontend Developer currently pursuing B.Tech in Information Technology at Adhiparasakthi Engineering College (Anna University). I specialise in crafting responsive, interactive web experiences using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.

During my 3-month MERN Stack internship at Novitech, I gained hands-on experience with full-stack development workflows. I'm continuously learning, building real-world projects, and eager to contribute to collaborative teams.
